name: Adamax
subtitle: Next-Generation Semax Derivative | Nootropic Neuropeptide

modifications: C-terminal adamantane group for enhanced stability and BBB penetration

overview: Synthetic nootropic peptide with N-terminal acetylation and C-terminal adamantane modification for superior stability and blood-brain barrier penetration, researched for cognitive enhancement, neuroprotection, and neuroplasticity.
mechanism: Crosses BBB via enhanced lipophilicity from adamantane; upregulates BDNF and TrkB receptor sensitivity; modulates dopamine, norepinephrine, and serotonin; stabilizes microtubules via ADNP-derived mechanisms; provides antioxidant and anti-inflammatory neuroprotection.
keyBenefits: Enhanced cognitive function and mental clarity
Improved focus and complex task handling
Stress resilience through HPA axis modulation

items.name: Cognitive Enhancement
items.description: Preliminary research suggests improvements in focus, mental clarity, memory consolidation, and complex task handling.

items.name: Neuroplasticity Support
items.description: BDNF upregulation and TrkB enhancement promote new neural connections and synaptic plasticity for long-term improvements.

items.name: Learning and Memory
items.description: May enhance memory formation, information retention, and learning efficiency through hippocampal BDNF-TrkB pathway activation.

items.name: Stroke Recovery
items.description: Preliminary observations indicate improved neurological outcomes through oxidative stress reduction and neuronal repair.

items.name: Oxidative Stress Protection
items.description: Demonstrates antioxidant properties protecting against oxidative damage and inflammation-induced neuronal injury.

items.name: Neuronal Maintenance
items.description: Supports neuronal survival and growth through BDNF enhancement and microtubule stabilization.

items.name: Mood Enhancement
items.description: Influences serotonin and dopamine to elevate mood and reduce depressive symptoms through neurotransmitter modulation.

items.name: Anxiety Reduction
items.description: Anecdotal reports indicate reduced overwhelm and anxiety through balanced neurotransmitter activity.

items.name: Stress Resilience
items.description: HPA axis modulation may improve stress response and emotional well-being.

deliveryMethods.overview: Enhanced cognitive function and neuroprotection through direct systemic delivery with superior bioavailability.

steps: Clean work area and hands thoroughly with alcohol
Calculate required BAC water volume using calculator
Draw calculated BAC water into syringe
Inject slowly down vial side (not directly onto powder)
Gently swirl until completely dissolved (never shake vigorously)
Store reconstituted solution in refrigerator at 2-8°C
Use within 14-30 days for optimal potency

deliveryMethods.overview: Convenient non-injectable administration with potentially smoother cognitive effects; lower bioavailability than injectable route.

interactions.notes: Adamax is an enhanced derivative with improved stability and bioavailability.
Adamax incorporates adamantyl portion from P21; may complement cognitive benefits.
Different mechanisms—Adamax targets neurological function; BPC-157 focuses on tissue repair.
Both enhance cognition through different mechanisms but share BDNF upregulation; start lower doses and monitor for overstimulation.

timeline.effects: Potential acute cognitive enhancement and improved focus
Enhanced mental clarity, reduced anxiety, improved mood
Maximum neuroprotective and structural brain benefits

stopSigns: Chest pain, heart palpitations, or significant blood pressure increases
Severe anxiety, insomnia, or mood disturbances
Unusual neurological symptoms or mental status changes
Persistent injection site reactions or infection signs
monitoring: Assess individual response at lower initial doses
Track tolerance development over cycling periods
Observe for mood or sleep changes
Use sterile injection technique to prevent infection

good: White, fluffy powder indicating proper freeze-drying
Clear solution after reconstitution with no particles or cloudiness
Proper labeling with peptide name, batch number, manufacturing date
warning: Slight compaction from shipping acceptable if powder dissolves completely
bad: Discoloration or yellowing indicates oxidation or degradation
Persistent cloudiness or particles indicate degradation or contamination

references.title: A Nootropic Adrenocorticotropin Analog 4-10 Semax: 15 Years Experience in Its Design and Study (Parent Compound)
references.authors: Ashmarin IP, Nezavibatko VN, Levitskaya NG, et al.
references.journal: Zhurnal Vysshei Nervnoi Deiatelnosti imeni I.P. Pavlova
references.keyFindings: Foundational Semax review: intranasal doses stimulate operative memory and attention for 20-24 hours. Adamax builds on the Semax core sequence with adamantane modification for enhanced stability and BBB penetration.

references.title: Semax, an Analog of ACTH(4-10), Regulates BDNF and trkB Expression in the Rat Hippocampus (Parent Compound)
references.authors: Dolotov OV, Karpenko EA, Inozemtseva LS, et al.
references.keyFindings: Single application at 50 mcg/kg produced 1.4-fold increase in BDNF protein and 1.6-fold increase in trkB tyrosine phosphorylation in rat hippocampus, supporting Adamax's BDNF-TrkB mechanism.

references.title: The Efficacy of Semax in the Treatment of Patients at Different Stages of Ischemic Stroke (Parent Compound)
references.authors: Gusev EI, Barskov IV, et al.
references.journal: Zhurnal Nevrologii i Psikhiatrii imeni S.S. Korsakova
references.keyFindings: 110 ischemic stroke patients; Semax (6000 mcg/day intranasal) increased BDNF plasma levels and accelerated functional recovery, providing the clinical basis for Adamax neuroprotective applications.

references.title: The Peptide Semax Affects the Expression of Genes Related to the Immune and Vascular Systems in Rat Brain Focal Ischemia (Parent Compound)
references.authors: Dergunova LV, Limborska SA, et al.
references.keyFindings: Genome-wide analysis: Semax modulated 24 vascular genes at 3h and enhanced immune-response gene expression at 24h post-ischemia, demonstrating multi-pathway neuroprotection.

latestResearch.title: The Potential of the Peptide Drug Semax and Its Derivative for Correcting Pathological Impairments in the Animal Model of Alzheimer's Disease
latestResearch.summary: Semax and its derivative improved cognitive functions in Alzheimer's transgenic mice with 2.8-fold reduction in amyloid plaques, supporting the therapeutic potential of Semax-family derivatives including Adamax.

latestResearch.title: Semax, a Copper Chelator Peptide, Decreases Cu(II)-Catalyzed ROS Production and Cytotoxicity of Abeta
latestResearch.summary: Semax extracts Cu(II) from amyloid-beta complexes and reduces ROS production, demonstrating neuroprotective copper-chelation properties shared by the Semax peptide family.

latestResearch.title: Semax Peptide Targets Mu Opioid Receptor Gene Oprm1 for Functional Recovery After Spinal Cord Injury
latestResearch.summary: Semax improved spinal cord injury functional recovery via mu-opioid receptor targeting and USP18 deubiquitination pathway, expanding understanding of Semax-family neuroprotective mechanisms.

quickStats.frequency: Once daily, or twice for enhanced neuroprotection
quickStats.storage: Lyophilized: room temp or freezer. Reconstituted: 2-8°C for 14-30 days
